channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: Amanda Knox says Catholic priest ‘saw my humanity’ in prison, helped restore faith in herself
item.description: When Amanda Knox was behind bars in Italy, she befriended an Italian priest, Don Saulo. Knox, now a mother of two, has written a new book, "Free: My Search for Meaning.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Trump says he would respect Supreme Court decision to return wrongly deported man
item.description: ABOARD AIR FORCE ONE — President Trump said Friday he would respect a Supreme Court decision to bring back a Maryland man the administration mistakenly deported to El Salvador. “If the Supreme Court said bring somebody back I would do that.
item.dc:creator: Brett Samuels, WFLA, NBC

item.title: US may already be in recession: BlackRock CEO
item.description: BlackRock CEO Larry Fink said during a recent interview that the United States may already be in a recession or getting very close to one as a result of President Trump’s sweeping tariffs.
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, WGN 9

item.title: Picture of Trump after the assassination attempt displaces Obama portrait at the White House
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The White House on Friday hung a painting of President Donald Trump depicting a moment after an assassination attempt against him last summer — bumping the official portrait of one of his predecessors, Barack Obama.
item.dc:creator: DARLENE SUPERVILLE and WILL WEISSERT, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Trump eyes major cuts to NOAA research
item.description: The Trump administration is eyeing cuts to climate, weather and ocean research in a draft budget blueprint for the National Oceanic and Atmospheric Administration (NOAA).
item.dc:creator: Rachel Frazin, Fox 5

item.title: WorldPride organizers caution transgender visitors from abroad
item.description: (The Hill) - Organizers of WorldPride, a global LGBTQ Pride event series to be held this year in Washington, issued an advisory Friday for transgender people from overseas, citing recent policies put forward by the Trump administration.
item.dc:creator: Brooke Migdon, KRON4

item.title: Trump administration refers Maine to DOJ over transgender athletes
item.description: The Department of Education on Friday referred a Title IX investigation into Maine schools to the Justice Department after the state failed to reach a resolution with the Trump administration over a finding that it violated federal anti-discrimination law by allowing transgender students to particip
item.dc:creator: Brooke Migdon, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Woman unknowingly gives birth to a stranger's baby after IVF clinic error
item.description: A woman in Australia unknowingly gave birth to a stranger’s baby after she received another patient's embryo from her in vitro fertilization clinic due to “human error,” the clinic said.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Here's a look at recent aircraft tragedies, mishaps and close calls
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Six people were killed Thursday in the latest string of aviation disasters after a sightseeing helicopter broke apart and crashed into the Hudson River between New York City and New Jersey. The crash comes at a time of heightened scrutiny of aircraft collisions and near-misses.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Could Trump's tariffs slow emissions? Sure, experts say, but at great cost overall
item.description: President Donald Trump’s sweeping global tariffs have stirred widespread anxiety about a severe economic downturn -- and curiosity, for some, about how it might affect the world’s warming climate.
item.dc:creator: JENNIFER McDERMOTT, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Doctors remove pig kidney from an Alabama woman after a record 130 days
item.description: An Alabama woman who lived with a pig kidney for a record 130 days had the organ removed after her body began rejecting it and is back on dialysis, doctors announced Friday – a disappointment in the ongoing quest for animal-to-human transplants.
item.dc:creator: LAURAN NEERGAARD, Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Plane crash near Florida highway kills 3 on board, injures 1 on the ground
item.description: A spokesperson for the Federal Aviation Administration said the plane, a Cessna 310, crashed at around 10:20 a.m. after departing from the nearby airport.
item.dc:creator: Michael Bartiromo, WGN 9

item.title: No, Casey Anthony did not open a Branson daycare
item.description: Google Trends showed a variety of topics being searched in Missouri on Thursday morning---sports, weather, the lottery, and one specific question: Did Casey Anthony open a daycare in Branson, Missouri?
item.dc:creator: Megan Mueller, WGN 9

item.title: NYC sightseeing helicopter plunges into river, killing 6 including Spanish family and pilot
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — A New York City sightseeing helicopter broke apart in midair Thursday and crashed upside-down into the Hudson River, killing the pilot and a family of five Spanish tourists in the latest U.S. aviation disaster, officials said.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL R. SISAK, JENNIFER PELTZ and TED SHAFFREY, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Family from Spain, pilot killed in NYC sightseeing helicopter crash
item.description: Photos posted on the helicopter company’s website showed the couple and their children smiling as they boarded just before the flight took off.
item.dc:creator: Matthew Euzarraga, Fox 5

item.title: Stocks climb but the dollar sinks as Wall Street closes a chaotic week
item.description: U.S. stocks are climbing in shaky trading Friday as President Donald Trump’s trade war with China escalates further and U.S. households get more worried about it.
item.dc:creator: Stan Choe, KRON4

item.title: Trump racks up another win on illegal immigration and more top headlines
item.description: Get all the stories you need-to-know from the most powerful name in news delivered first thing every morning to your inbox.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: China announces countermeasures by raising tariffs on US goods from 84% to 125% from Saturday
item.description: BEIJING (AP) — China announced countermeasures on Friday, raising tariffs on U.S. goods from 84% to 125% starting Saturday. The U.S. and China have escalated trade war by raising tariffs even as U.S. President Donald Trump hit a pause on tariffs for other countries.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: The Latest: Supreme Court tells Trump administration to facilitate return of mistakenly deported man
item.description: The Supreme Court on Thursday said President Donald Trump’s administration must facilitate the return of Kilmar Abrego Garcia, a Maryland man who was mistakenly deported to El Salvador, rejecting the administration’s emergency appeal.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Olivia Munn mocks Trump's tariffs during surprise 'Daily Show' appearance
item.description: "Trump knows exactly what he's doing. He put tariffs that destroyed the global economy, so then he took them off, and now it's only mostly destroyed," Munn said.
item.dc:creator: Judy Kurtz, NewsNation

item.title: Man arrested for 'economic interruption' after dump truck crash causes Draper power outage
item.description: Police arrested a man for allegedly knocking down power poles while driving a dump truck with the lift gate up on Wednesday afternoon.
item.dc:creator: Aubree B. Jennings, ABC 4

item.title: Mourners pay tribute to merengue icon Rubby Pérez, who died in the Dominican roof collapse
item.description: Fans and countrymen on Thursday shared their remembrances of Dominican Republic music icon Rubby Pérez, who was among the scores of people killed this week after the roof at the Jet Set club in Santo Domingo collapsed. He was 69.
item.dc:creator: FERNANDA FIGUEROA, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Helicopter crashes in New York City's Hudson River; 6 dead
item.description: A Bell 206 helicopter belonging to a tour company crashed in the water near Jersey City and Hoboken around 3:15 p.m., according to NYPD Commissioner Jessica Tisch.
item.dc:creator: Emily Rahhal, KRON4

item.title: House Republicans pass bill requiring proof of citizenship to vote
item.description: House Republicans for a second time passed a stand-alone bill that would require proof of citizenship to vote in federal elections and impose voter roll purge requirements on states. The legislation — formally titled the Safeguard American Voter Eligibility (SAVE) Act — passed in a 220-208 vote.
item.dc:creator: Rebecca Beitsch, ABC 4

item.title: Egg prices jump to record high despite Trump's predictions and bird flu slowing
item.description: The increase reported Thursday in the Consumer Price Index means consumers and businesses that rely on eggs should not anticipate immediate relief.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Author Jillian Lauren, wife of Weezer bassist, arrested after being shot by police
item.description: Jillian Lauren, author and wife of Weezer bassist Scott Shriner, was shot and injured by Los Angeles police and arrested on suspicion of attempted murder after pointing a gun at officers from her front yard, authorities said.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Sweepstakes giant Publishers Clearing House files for bankruptcy
item.description: Publishers Clearing House, famous for its big checks and sweepstakes, files for Chapter 11 bankruptcy as it shifts to digital advertising.
item.dc:creator: Joshua Hallenbeck, KRON4

item.title: Texas lottery player claims he was cheated out of $95 million jackpot win
item.description: A Texas lottery player filed a lawsuit in Travis County on Tuesday alleging his May 2023 Lotto Texas jackpot prize was severely diminished by $95 million because a group of lottery retailers and a London-based sports gambling company conspired to rig a lottery drawing less than a month before his wi
item.dc:creator: Dylan McKim, KRON4

item.title: Rumor of monkey trade for child leads to Missouri foster mom's arrest
item.description: Officials say new child abuse charges filed against a Winfield woman who has fostered children for a decade are "just the tip of the iceberg.
item.dc:creator: Megan Mueller, KRON4

item.title: LeBron James becomes first pro male athlete to have likeness depicted in Ken doll
item.description: LeBron James has become the first professional male athlete to have his likeness depicted in a Ken doll.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Are dire wolves de-extinct? Genetically engineered pups spark controversy
item.description: Three genetically engineered wolves that may resemble extinct dire wolves are in an undisclosed secure location in the U.S.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Stowaways found dead in JetBlue landing gear identified as teens
item.description: Two stowaways found dead in the landing gear compartment of a JetBlue plane earlier this year have been identified.
item.dc:creator: Josh DuBose, Fox 5

item.title: YouTuber and entrepreneur MrBeast slams Trump's 'brutal' tariffs
item.description: MrBeast, whose real name is Jimmy Donaldson, called the tariffs a "nail in the coffin" for small businesses.
item.dc:creator: Tara Suter, WGN 9

item.title: Group calls for investigation into Ms. Rachel over posts about Gaza children
item.description: Rachel Griffin Accurso, who goes by Ms. Rachel to her more than 14 million subscribers on YouTube, makes videos for children.
item.dc:creator: Lauren Irwin, WGN 9

item.title: Rich on Tech Radio Recap: Nintendo News, Mesh Wi-Fi & Online Privacy
item.description: You see my segments on TV, but did you know I also host a national radio show called Rich On Tech? Each week, I share helpful tech news, tips, and answer your questions on radio stations across the country — from KFI AM 640 in Los Angeles to 710 WOR in New York City.
item.dc:creator: Rich DeMuro, KTLA 5

item.title: Trump tariffs, including massive levies on China, go into effect
item.description: President Donald Trump's latest round of sweeping reciprocal tariffs went into effect early Wednesday, including a 104 percent import tax on China.
item.dc:creator: Lauren Irwin, Fox 5

item.title: Shake Shack brings Dubai Chocolate Pistachio Shake to select L.A. locations
item.description: For those who were unsuccessful in recreating the viral Dubai chocolate bar or can’t afford a trip to get an authentic bar, Shake Shack has you covered. The fast-casual chain launched its Dubai Chocolate Pistachio Shake on Monday at select locations in New York City, Los Angeles, and Miami.
item.dc:creator: Iman Palm, KTLA 5
